subject: Re: Typical parameters to refine for M
body:
Hi Huy,
—refine_tiltmovies will refine the motion correction of your tilt movies based on your high resolution map. Refining tilt movies is not the same as frame alignment in RELION which aligns the motion corrected averages for each tilt, RELIONs procedure is more similar to image warping.
Volume warp allows you to model sample deformations in 3D over time, certain 3D deformations are strictly impossible to account for with 2D image warping alone.
Please spend some time reading the M paper to understand what is being refined and how it works :-)
Cheers,
Alister
Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
On Dec 23, 2024, at 21:12, Huy Bui <huybk81@gmail.com> wrote:
﻿
Thanks Alister,
Does refine_tiltmovies similar to Frame align in Relion 5? What about refine_volumewarp?
Best,
Huy
On Mon, Dec 23, 2024 at 9:19 PM Alister Burt <
alisterburt@gmail.com
> wrote:
Hi Huy, 
What’s right depends on the quality of your data and how homogenous your particle set is, I always suggest starting conservatively (image warp 1x1, particle poses with no temporal resolution) and seeing how things behave. If things improve you can then add more parameters iteratively. If they don’t, you’ve likely overfit the model and it’s best to backtrack. It’s advisable to only try to refine CTF parameters when at or below 5-7Å or so.
Good luck and happy holidays,
Alister
Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
On Dec 22, 2024, at 11:03, Huy Bui <
huybk81@gmail.com
> wrote:
﻿Hi everyone,
I am new to Warp and M and want to hear some experience here.
My map go to 8.2A with Relion 5 (Pixel size 2.12). I used the guideline refinement and get to 7.3 Angstrom resolution. When I looked in the population file, I saw quite a lot of option. Clearly the map is not high res enough to do some of the options there. Anyone has a good strategy to refinement options at my resolution?


<LastRefinementOptions>


		<Param Name="NIterations" Value="3" />


		<Param Name="DoDefocusGridSearch" Value="False" />


		<Param Name="DoZernike4" Value="False" />


		<Param Name="DoZernike2" Value="False" />


		<Param Name="DoDoming" Value="False" />


		<Param Name="DoCs" Value="False" />


		<Param Name="DoPhaseShift" Value="False" />


		<Param Name="DoAstigmatismAngle" Value="False" />


		<Param Name="DoAstigmatismDelta" Value="False" />


		<Param Name="DoDefocus" Value="False" />


		<Param Name="DoTiltMovies" Value="False" />


		<Param Name="GeometryHighPass" Value="20" />


		<Param Name="DoZernike5" Value="False" />


		<Param Name="DoZernike13" Value="False" />


		<Param Name="DoMagnification" Value="False" />


		<Param Name="DoParticlePoses" Value="True" />


		<Param Name="DoAxisAngles" Value="False" />


		<Param Name="VolumeWarpLength" Value="10" />


		<Param Name="VolumeWarpDepth" Value="2" />


		<Param Name="VolumeWarpHeight" Value="3" />


		<Param Name="VolumeWarpWidth" Value="3" />


		<Param Name="DoVolumeWarp" Value="False" />


		<Param Name="ImageWarpHeight" Value="3" />


		<Param Name="ImageWarpWidth" Value="3" />


		<Param Name="DoImageWarp" Value="True" />


		<Param Name="UseHostMemory" Value="True" />


		<Param Name="MinParticlesPerItem" Value="10" />


		<Param Name="InitialResolutionPercent" Value="80" />


		<Param Name="BatchSize" Value="16" />


		<Param Name="BFactorWeightingThreshold" Value="0.25" />


		<Param Name="MinimumCTFRefinementResolution" Value="7" />


		<Param Name="CTFHighPass" Value="20" />


	</LastRefinementOptions>
Best,
Huy
